headline: A Look At Newmont (NEM) Valuation As Shares Trade Near Estimated Fair Value
summary: What the latest figures say about Newmont (NEM) Newmont (NEM) has drawn fresh attention as investors reassess its recent performance, with the stock up 1.2% over the past day, roughly flat over the past month, and down 8.3% over the past 3 months. See our latest analysis for Newmont. Zooming out, Newmont’s share price has gained 8.2% year to date, while the 1 year total shareholder return of 100.0% and 3 year total shareholder return of 178.6% reflect recent performance. headline: Is It Too Late To Reassess Newmont (NEM) After Its 1 Year 96% Surge?
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Newmont at around US$107 a share still offers value after a strong run, or if most of the potential upside is already reflected in the price. The stock has moved only slightly over the past week at 0.2%, and over the last month it is down 0.8%. It shows returns of 6.2% year to date, 96.5% over 1 year, 174.0% over 3 years, and 77.5% over 5 years. Recent headlines around gold producers and broader materials stocks have kept attention on Newmont, with...
